responses:
theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
  Topology.P2 (A : Set X) → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hA
  unfold Topology.P2 Topology.P1 at hA ⊢
  exact subset_trans hA interior_subset

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A :=
by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P1] at *
  intro x hxA
  have : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2 hxA
  exact interior_subset this
